headline: Tvardi Therapeutics to Participate in Upcoming Investor Events
summary: HOUSTON, May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tvardi Therapeutics, Inc. (“Tvardi”) (NASDAQ: TVRD), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of novel, oral, small molecule therapies targeting STAT3 to treat inflammatory and proliferative diseases, today announced that management will participate in the following upcoming investor events: Jefferies Global Healthcare ConferenceFormat: Fireside Chat and 1-on-1 MeetingsDate: Thursday, June 4, 2026Time: 8:10 AM ETLocation: New
